person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
«b»Biography
Extract from The Family of Staunton of Staunton:«/b»

The deeds relating to the various transactions of this Sir William de Staunton are somewhat faded, evidently from the action of damp, though still quite legible. In 1277 he was required by Robert de Ros of Belvoir, his over-lord, to accompany him to the war in Wales, and was granted a protection until Michaelmas while on this service, and two years later he went into France on military service. He was owner of large possessions in Lincolnshire and elsewhere, including the Manors of Bassingham and Quarrington.

In his will, dated 9th November, 1312, this William gave his body to be buried in the churchyard at Staunton, with which he bequeathed his palfrey with its furniture. A breast-plate dug up on the restoration of the church, and now hanging in St. Lawrence's choir, probably belonged to this stout knight. To William, his son, in his will he gave a ring with a sapphire and another with a seal of cornelian, likewise a murrey cup with a foot; to Isabel his own wife he gave a silver cup in which was a certain shield. After other like legacies, which included a cup of a nut to his grandson Geoffrey, he left to the friar Elias of Leasingham 6s. and 8d. for the first day of his sepulchre, and 10 marks for the 7th. He left also instructions that two foot-men should go on the first passage to the Holy Land in his name, and each have five marks.

Sir William died in 1326, predeceased by his son William, mentioned in the above will. The estates therefore passed to Sir William's grandson, Geoffrey de Staunton, the third and last of that name, who held them until his death in 1370.

sourceList.title: William De Staunton, "Find A Grave Index"

zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Staunton於1235年出生在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾時，他的父親Geoffrey de Staunton41歲，母親Alice Ros37歲。他於1265年與Isabel De Kirketon在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1326年5月在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾史道頓享年91歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾史道頓。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Staunton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Caitlin, Ciaran, Cormac.

English and Irish: variant of Stanton . This English name has been established (in this spelling) since medieval times in Ireland (Mayo, Connacht), where it has been Gaelicized as de Stonndún. Compare McEvilly .

variants.name: McEvilly
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac an Mhílidh ‘son of the knight’, from Gaelic míleadh ‘warrior, knight’. In County Mayo and County Cork, a family of English origin Gaelicized their name from Staunton to Mac an Mhílidh, apparently because of the latter's presumed similarity to the name of their ancestor, Milo de Stanton.

variants.name: Stanton
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places in England called Stanton or Staunton, especially Stanton in Staffordshire and Staunton in Worcestershire, all named with Old English stān ‘stone’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Most of the placenames come from their situation on stony ground, but in the case of Stanton Harcourt in Oxfordshire and Stanton Drew in Avon the reference is to the proximity of prehistoric stone monuments. The name has also sometimes been chosen by Ashkenazic Jews as an Americanized form of various like-sounding Jewish surnames. This surname has also long been established in Ireland (especially Mayo).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Staunton was born in 1235, in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Geoffrey de Staunton, was 41 and his mother, Alice Ros, was 37. He married Isabel De Kirketon in 1265, in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died in May 1326, in Staunton, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 91, and was buried in Staunton, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de Staunton est né en 1235, à Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Geoffrey de Staunton, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Alice Ros, avait 37 ans. Il a épousé Isabel De Kirketon en 1265, à Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en mai 1326, à Staunton, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 91 ans, et a été enterré à Staunton, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als William de Staunton 1235 in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Geoffrey de Staunton 41 und seine Mutter Alice Ros 37. Er hat 1265 in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom Isabel De Kirketon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb im Mai 1326 im Alter von 91 Jahren in Staunton, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Staunton, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William de Staunton è nato il nel 1235 nel Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Geoffrey de Staunton, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Alice Ros, aveva 37 anni. Lui sposato Isabel De Kirketon nel 1265, nel Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel maggio 1326, nel Staunton, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 91 anni, e fu sepolto a Staunton, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Stauntonが1235年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアで生まれた時，父Geoffrey de Stauntonは41歳，母Alice Rosは37歳であった。1265年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアでIsabel De Kirketonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1326年5月にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアスタウントンで91歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアスタウントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William de Staunton(이)가 1235년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Geoffrey de Staunton(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Ros(은)는 37세였다. 그는 1265년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르에서 Isabel De Kirketon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1326년 5월 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 스타운턴에서 91세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 스타운턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William de Staunton nasceu em 1235, em Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Geoffrey de Staunton, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Alice Ros, tinha 37 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabel De Kirketon em 1265, em Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em maio de 1326, em Staunton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 91 anos, e foi sepultado em Staunton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Staunton родился в 1235 г. в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Geoffrey de Staunton было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Alice Ros, 37. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel De Kirketon в 1265 г. в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер май 1326 г. в местности стаунтон, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 91 год и был похоронен в местности стаунтон, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William de Staunton nació en 1235, en Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Geoffrey de Staunton, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Alice Ros, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Isabel De Kirketon en 1265, en Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en mayo de 1326, en Staunton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 91 años, y fue sepultado en Staunton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
